file_name: Complete Air Supply - All Air - third party questionnaire.pdf

questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition, including if Complete Air Supply and All Air are close competitors and there are not many alternatives or if one is a major supplier to competitors of the other.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Complete Air Supply and/or All Air.
